summary: Comprehensive testing of Decision Replay feature for Philos Orientation app. All backend APIs working correctly (POST /api/memory/replay, GET /api/memory/replays/{user_id}). Frontend UI components (DecisionReplaySection, DecisionHistorySection) functioning as expected with Hebrew RTL layout.
critical_code_review_comments: All required data-testid attributes present (decision-replay-section, replay-btn-{idx}, alt-path-{id}, close-replay-btn, replay-insight)
Hebrew labels correctly implemented (מסלול תרומה, מסלול סדר, מסלול נזק, מסלול הימנעות)
Predicted metrics properly displayed (סדר צפוי, קולקטיב צפוי, לחץ נזק, יציבות)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for replay metadata
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decision Replay feature fully tested. Backend APIs (POST /api/memory/replay, GET /api/memory/replays/{user_id}) working. Frontend DecisionReplaySection renders correctly with Hebrew RTL. All test-ids verified: decision-replay-section, replay-btn-{idx}, alt-path-{id}, close-replay-btn, replay-insight.

frontend_tests: Decision History 'בדוק מסלול חלופי' button visible - PASS
Original decision shown with 'ההחלטה המקורית' - PASS
Alternative paths show Hebrew labels (מסלול תרומה, מסלול סדר, מסלול נזק) - PASS
Predicted metrics displayed (סדר צפוי, קולקטיב צפוי, לחץ נזק, יציבות) - PASS
Balance difference indicators shown (+/- איזון) - PASS
Hebrew insight text displayed when selecting alternative - PASS
Close button (X) closes the replay section - PASS

features_verified.replay_button: בדוק מסלול חלופי button renders on history items
features_verified.alternative_paths: 2-3 alternative paths generated with Hebrew labels
features_verified.predicted_metrics: Shows סדר צפוי, קולקטיב צפוי, לחץ נזק, יציבות
features_verified.insight_text: Hebrew insight generated on path selection
